name: Enochian tablet: the elemental tablets of Dr. John Dee's Enochian magic, 12x13 grids of letters encoding angelic names and powers. FSPLIT: the tablet is read by scanning rows, columns, and diagonals, splitting the unified tablet surface into individual angelic names. FFUSE: the names are called in their hierarchical order, reconstituting the tablet's full authority. VINIT: blank wax tablet. TANCH: the outer border of the tablet (the 12x13 grid). AFWD: reading a name forward. AREV: reading a name in reverse (the angels of wrath). ENGAGR: the black cross — the center of the tablet where all directions meet and a name reads the same in all directions.

phase_0.domain_name: Enochian tablet: the elemental tablets of Dr. John Dee's Enochian magic, 12x13 grids of letters encoding angelic names and powers. FSPLIT: the tablet is read by scanning rows, columns, and diagonals, splitting the unified tablet surface into individual angelic names. FFUSE: the names are called in their hierarchical order, reconstituting the tablet's full authority. VINIT: blank wax tablet. TANCH: the outer border of the tablet (the 12x13 grid). AFWD: reading a name forward. AREV: reading a name in reverse (the angels of wrath). ENGAGR: the black cross — the center of the tablet where all directions meet and a name reads the same in all directions.

VINIT.justification: void/uninitialized state before any letters are inscribed

TANCH.chosen_element: the outer border of the 12x13 grid
TANCH.justification: the closed boundary that contains the entire system of letters and names

AFWD.chosen_element: reading a name forward (left to right, top to bottom)
AFWD.justification: forward morphism toward the angelic power

AREV.chosen_element: reading a name in reverse (the angels of wrath)
AREV.justification: reverse/descent morphism, invoking the inverse or wrathful aspect

CLINK.chosen_element: the sequential calling of names in a prescribed order
CLINK.justification: composition of morphisms — chaining forward or reverse readings

IMSCRIB.chosen_element: the central name that reads the same in all directions (the black cross)
IMSCRIB.justification: self-identity, the name that is its own mirror

FSPLIT.chosen_element: scanning the tablet by rows, columns, and diagonals
FSPLIT.justification: splits the unified tablet surface into individual angelic names

FFUSE.chosen_element: calling the names in hierarchical order
FFUSE.justification: reconstitutes the tablet's full authority from the individual names

EVALT.chosen_element: a name correctly pronounced and understood
EVALT.justification: affirmative/success state — the name yields its power

EVALF.justification: negative/failure state — the name yields no power or wrath

ENGAGR.chosen_element: the black cross at the center of the tablet
ENGAGR.justification: paradox: a name that reads the same in all directions, where all directions meet

IFIX.chosen_element: the inscribed letters on the tablet
IFIX.justification: permanent irreversible record — once inscribed, the letters are fixed

phase_2.split_element: scanning the tablet by rows, columns, and diagonals
phase_2.fuse_element: calling the names in hierarchical order

phase_3.void_description: blank wax tablet before any inscription
phase_3.true_description: a name correctly pronounced and understood
phase_3.both_description: the black cross — a name that is both all directions and none

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: The magician recognizes the tablet as a unified whole.
Step 2 AREV: The magician traces the border in reverse (counterclockwise) to invoke the wrathful aspect.
Step 3 FSPLIT: The magician scans rows, columns, and diagonals to extract individual names.
Step 4 AFWD: The magician reads each name forward to call its power.
Step 5 FFUSE: The magician calls the names in hierarchical order to reconstitute the tablet's authority.
Step 6 CLINK: The magician links the names in a sequential ritual chain.
Step 7 IFIX: The magician inscribes the names permanently in the record.
Step 8 IMSCRIB: The magician recognizes the tablet as a unified whole once more.

phase_5.compiler_frontend: the angelic language (Enochian) that translates intentions into names
phase_5.ipc_mechanism: the hierarchical order of names — how they communicate power within the tablet
phase_5.memory_mechanism: the inscribed letters on the tablet — state is stored and retrieved by reading
phase_5.scheduler_mechanism: the ritual timing (planetary hours, etc.) that determines order and timing
phase_5.alfs_store: the Book of Enoch (or Dee's diaries) as the canonical reference

phase_6.cycle_cost: the magician's focused attention and ritual energy
phase_6.pre_cycle_state: tablet as a static grid of letters
phase_6.post_cycle_state: tablet as a dynamic source of angelic names and powers
phase_6.delta_s_verdict: ΔS ≈ 0 — the cycle of splitting and fusing names conserves the tablet's total authority
